upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra nu vocaM cikituze janAya mA gAmanAgAmaditiM vaDizwa' (f॰8.90.15) pravocam=prabravImi=upadiSAmi=anuSAsmi
'taM pravakzyAmi BAratIm' (rA॰2.64.37) pravakzyAmi=vakzyAmi praSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'omiti brahmaRaH pravakzyannAha' (tE॰u॰1.8)
'yo mA prAvocaH' (tE॰saM॰2.6.6.1) yo madrahasyamanyasmA AKyad ityAha
'mA no agne durBftaye pravocaH' (f॰7.1.22) mA naH parAdAH mA naH parasmE rIraDa ityAha
'pra RaH pUrvasmE suvitAya vocata' (f॰8.27.10)
'pra ca dAtAramamUtezu vocaH' (mE॰saM॰4.13.7) pravocaH=kIrtaya=praKyApaya
'saYjYaptaH paSuriti prokte' (kA॰SrO॰6.5.23) prokte=prakaraRokte=uccArvyAhfte
'na hi pARininA SabdAH proktAH kintarhi sUtram (BAzye) proktA uccAritAH
'tasmE hAprocyEva pravAsAYcakre' (CAM॰u॰4.10.2) aprocya=anivedya=anAmantrya ihApi praSabdo viSezakfnna
'agryAH sarvezu vedezu sarvapravacanezu ca' (manu॰3.104) prakarzeRocyate vyAKyAyate vedArTa eBiriti pravacanAnyaNgAni
'svADyAyapravacanAByAM na pramaditavyam' (tE॰u॰1.11.1) pravacanamaDyApanam
'bfhaspatiSca pravaktA indraScADyetA' (BAzye paspaSAyAm) pravaktA=aDyApakaH
'pra taM vivakmi vakmyo ya ezAm' (f0 11677) pravivakmi pravivacmi varRayAmi
'kastamevaM pravakzyati' (mAtsya pu0 24239) pravaciriha nindAyAm anyatrAtrArTe viralaH prayogaH
'parAvAkAya te namaH' (aTarva॰6.13.2) parAvAkaH parABavavacanam
'ekA ca me daSa ca me'pavaktAra ozaDe' (aTarva॰5.15.1) ninditAra ityAha
'apade pAdA pratiDAtave'karutApavaktA hfdayAviDaScit' (f॰1.24.8) apavaktA=vacanena vArayitA
'svargyo Darmo hyezAM nirucyate' (BA0 SAM0 832) utkfzwatvena kIrtyata ityarTaH
'SalyAnniravocamahaM vizam' (aTarva0 464) nirgataM bravImIti sAyaRaH vacasA nirgamayAmItyanye
'niruktamenaH kanIyo Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 25220) niruktaM pratipannamityarTaH
'aniruktaH prajApatiH' (Sa0 brA0 142221) anirukto vacasA'nirUpitaH akftalakzaRa ityarTaH ata eva kaH prajApateraBiKyA Bavati sarvasya prazwavyatvAt
'akzOhiRI tu paryAyErniruktA ca varUTinI' (BA0 u0 15625) niruktA=vyAKyAtA=spazwIkftA
'enaM prApya durAtmAnaM kzayaM kzatraM gamizyati tadidaM vacanaM tezAM niruktaM vE janArdana kzayaM yAtA hi rAjAnaH…' (BA0 Salya0 2444-45) niruktaM vispazwam avitaTamityarTaH tezAM sidDAnAm
'pAtraM tvatra niruktaM vE kaviBiH pAtravittamEH' (BA0 pu0 71434) vispazwamuktam lakzaRenoktam
'vedAMSca vedyaM tu viDiM ca kftsnamaTo niruktaM paramArTatAM ca' (BA0 SAM0 24530)
'sa eza AtmA hfdi tasyEtadeva niruktaM hfdayamiti' (CAM0 u0 833)
'zaqASrayaRAcCarIram iti SarIranirvacanena pUrvoktotpattikrama eva dfQIkftaH' (manu0 117 ityatra kullUkaH) nirvacanaM niruktirvyutpattiH
'guRataH Sabdanizpattirnirvacanam' (kO0 a0 151180)
'nAmanirvacanaM tasya SlokamenaM surA jaguH' (BA0 pu0 92037)
'nirvacanamASizAm' (SAM0 SrO0 6137) nirvacanamASaMsanaprakAraH
'pranazwaM SAntanorvaMSaM samIkzya punarudDftam tato nirvacanaM loke sarvarAzwrezvavartata' (BA0 Adi0 10923).. nirvacanaM praSastiH
'tato nirvacanaM loke sarvarAzwrezvavartata vIrasUnAM kASisute deSAnAM kurujANgalam' (BA0 14359).. nirvacanaM lokavAdaH pravAdaH ABARakaH
'na nirmanyuH kzatriyosti loke nirvacanaM smftam' (BA0 vana0 2737) ukto'rTaH
'SvadftO kzIramAsakta brahma vA vfzale yaTA iti loke nirvacanaM puraScarati BArata' (BA0 vana0 3382).. uktapUrva evArTaH
'yezAM tawAkAni mahodakAni vApyaSca kUpASca pratiSrayASca annasya dAnaM maDurA ca vARI yamasya te'nirvacanA Bavanti..' yamavArtAmapi na SfRvantItyarTaH
'mAlyena tAM nirvacanaM jaGAna' (ku0 719).. nirvacanaM SabdoktimantareRa niSSabdam tUzRIm niBftam ityarTaH
'nAhaM vedAn vinindAmi na vivikzyAmi karhicit' (BA0 SAM0 26812) **vivakzyAmi vizamaM vakzyAmi
'kiM no asya draviRaM kadDa ratnaM vi no vocaH' (f0 4512) vyavocaH=vyAKyaH=vyAcazWAH=vyAkaroH
'asti svinnu vIrya …na svidasti tadftuTA vi vocaH' (f0 6183) ukto'rTaH
'tezAM (praSnAnAM) nEkaMcanASakaM vivaktum' (CAM0 u0 535) vivaktuM vivarItum prativaktum
'sA hovAca namaste'stu yAjYavalkya yo ma etaM vyavocaH' (Sa0 brA0 14685) ukto'rTaH
'rudanha mftyurvyuvAca praSnam' (Apa0 Da0 1113224) vyuvAca vivicyovAca
'taM hovAca nEtadabrAhmaRo vivaktumarhati' (CAM0 u0 445) vivaktuM vispazwaM vaktum
'vi toke apsu tanaye ca sUre'vocanta carzaRayo vivAcaH' (f0 6311) vyavocanta virudDamaBAzanta vyavadanta
'duryoDanaM nEkftikaM nyavocat' (BA0 Salya0 5912) nyavocat nyagarhata AkroSat apAvadat
'avocAma nivacanAnyasmin' (f0 11898) nindAvacanAnyavocAmetyarTaH
'maDyepade nivacane ca' (pA0 1476) vacanasyABAvo nivacanam
'aDi vocA nu sunvate' (f0 11321) pakzapAtena brUhi
'viSvAhendro aDivaktA no astu' (f0 110211)
'aDyavocadaDivaktA praTamo dEvyo Bizak' (vA0 saM0 165) ukto'rTaH
'namaste aDivAkAya parAvAkAya te namaH' (aTarva0 6132) aDivAkAya aDivacanaM pakzapAtena vacanaM kurvate
'tamidDanezu hitezvaDivAkAya havante' (f0 8165) aDivAkAya pakzapAtena vacanAya
'tasmAcCavo'Dyucyate' (aTarva0 11834) aDirarTe nAntaraM karoti ucyata ityevArTaH
'yo nAtyuktaH prAha rUkzaM priyaM vA' (BA0 SAM0 29917) atyukto ninditaH stuto vA
'yaTendra udvAcanaM labDvA' (aTarva0 588) udvAcanaH kaScidasuraH
'udvivakzA yA nivfttamaDikftya vicAryate' (E0 brA0 zaqguruSizyoktiH) nigadavyAKyAtam
'yo vE brahmaRe deveByaH prajApataye'pratiprocyASvaM meDyaM baDnAti' (tE0 brA0 3831) apratiprocya=anuktvA tadanujYAmalabDvA
